words.def: fastener consisting of a resinous composition that is plastic when warm; used for sealing documents and parcels and letters
words.zh: n. 印章, 封條, 海豹, 海豹皮, 火漆, 封蠟, 璽, 保證, 批准, 象徵, 標誌
n. 出售, 賣, 拍賣, 銷售額, 廉價出售

words.def: a general name for beer made with a top fermenting yeast; in some of the United States an ale is (by law) a brew of more than 4% alcohol by volume
a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land
words.zh: n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
